caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 16 kt winds with a 75% rain probability, while 5.8 ft waves are building across the Lesser Antilles. Martinique is seeing similar conditions, with 15 kt winds and less severe wave action, as a tropical weather system moves through the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing max winds of 21 kt and wave heights of 5.2 ft with a dominant swell direction of NNE and less than 10% rain probability. Lisbon, in contrast, is seeing much calmer conditions with max winds of 0 kt, making Mykonos the top impact port in the Mediterranean today.
